claims.claim: Cannot provide meaningful report on Belgium due to lack of relevant source materials
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently reported the same inability to cover Belgium due to inadequate sources

claims.claim: Source materials consist entirely of Microsoft Outlook technical support documentation
claims.reasoning: All agents reported this and it is verified by sources 1-5 which are Microsoft Community support threads

claims.claim: Source materials include Google Chrome browser features and account creation procedures
claims.reasoning: All agents reported this and it is verified by sources 7-14 which are Google Chrome and account documentation

claims.claim: Source materials include Chinese-language documentation for industrial inductive sensors
claims.reasoning: All agents reported this and it is verified by source 6 which contains Chinese industrial sensor specifications

claims.claim: No Belgian political, economic, or social developments can be reported based on available sources
claims.reasoning: Two agents independently reported this identical claim

claims.claim: Sources are categorized as relating to Dutch or German language content on economic or social topics but do not actually address Belgium
claims.reasoning: All three agents independently noted the mismatch between source categorization and actual content

claims.claim: Microsoft Community sources detail technical issues with email authentication, POP3 server configurations, and storage management problems
claims.reasoning: Verified by examining sources 1-5 which contain these specific technical issues

claims.claim: Coverage requirements for Belgian affairs cannot be met with current source materials
claims.reasoning: Two agents independently reported this conclusion

claims.claim: No information available regarding Belgian governance, trade, labor, or cultural affairs
claims.reasoning: Verified by the absence of such content in all provided sources
